channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [PURVA] Puravankara gives ₹196 Cr corporate guarantee for subsidiary NCDs
item.description:
Puravankara Ltd has issued a corporate guarantee of ₹196 crore on behalf of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Purvaland Private Limited. This guarantee supports the issuance of Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) of the same amount, with Vistra ITCL (India) Limited acting as the debenture trustee. The company clarified that this guarantee represents a contingent liability for Puravankara, but currently, there is no direct impact on the listed entity as it is provided for a wholly-owned subsidiary within the consolidated group. The transaction does not involve any interest from promoter/promoter group/group companies, other than Purvaland Private Limited itself.

  • Puravankara provided a ₹196 crore corporate guarantee for its WOS.
  • The guarantee supports Purvaland Private Limited's NCD issuance.
  • This creates a contingent liability for the parent company.
  • No immediate financial impact is expected on Puravankara.
  • The transaction is solely for the subsidiary's benefit.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Puravankara Ltd | Category: Loan & Debt

item.title: [RRECL] RDB Real Estate clarifies share price movement to Exchange
item.description:
RDB Real Estate Constructions Ltd responded to an Exchange query dated April 13, 2026, concerning significant movement in its equity share price. The company affirmed its consistent compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, by making timely disclosures of all material and price-sensitive information. RDB Real Estate confirmed that, as of the current date, there are no pending announcements, events, or developments that could have a material or price-sensitive impact on its share price. The company attributed the share price fluctuations to market dynamics and factors beyond its control.

  • RDB Real Estate responded to Exchange query on share price movement.
  • Company confirms timely disclosure of all material information.
  • No pending price-sensitive information to disclose.
  • Share price movement attributed to market dynamics.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RDB Real Estate Constructions Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [CNL] Creative Newtech CFO Abhijit Kanvinde resigns due to personal reasons
item.description:
Creative Newtech Ltd announced the resignation of Mr. Abhijit Divakar Kanvinde from his position as Chief Financial Officer (CFO). His resignation is effective from the close of business hours on April 14, 2026. Mr. Kanvinde cited personal reasons for his departure, including advancing age, health considerations, and the demanding nature of the CFO role. The company confirmed that no other material reasons were provided for his resignation, which was accepted by the Chairman and Managing Director, Mr. Ketan Chhaganlal Patel, on the same day.

  • Creative Newtech's CFO, Abhijit Kanvinde, has resigned.
  • Resignation is effective from April 14, 2026, close of business hours.
  • Reasons cited are personal: advancing age, health, and demanding role.
  • No other material reasons for the resignation were disclosed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Creative Newtech Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [METAINFO] Meta Infotech commences operations at Chennai location
item.description:
Meta Infotech Ltd has announced the commencement of its operations at a new Chennai location, effective April 14, 2026. This strategic move is part of the company's broader business expansion strategy. Currently, the operations at the Chennai facility are being conducted through a work-from-home arrangement. This expansion indicates the company's efforts to grow its geographical footprint and potentially enhance its market reach.

  • Meta Infotech commenced operations at Chennai on April 14, 2026.
  • This move is part of the company's business expansion strategy.
  • Operations are currently being carried out via work-from-home.
  • Signals potential for increased market presence and growth.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Meta Infotech Ltd | Category: Expansion

item.title: [APOLLOPIPES] Apollo Pipes Mirzapur plant begins commercial production
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Apollo Pipes Ltd announced the commencement of commercial production at its new manufacturing plant located in Mirzapur, Uttar Pradesh. The plant started operations on April 14, 2026, as per the company's earlier intimations. This expansion is expected to boost the company's manufacturing capabilities and strengthen its presence in the region.

  • New manufacturing plant in Mirzapur, Uttar Pradesh.
  • Commercial production commenced on April 14, 2026.
  • Enhances company's production capacity.
  • Strengthens market presence in Uttar Pradesh.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Apollo Pipes Ltd | Category: Expansion

item.title: [NANTA] Nanta Tech clarifies BSE query on significant price movement
item.description:
Nanta Tech Ltd responded to a query from BSE regarding a significant movement in its security price. The company informed that the price fluctuation is purely due to market conditions and is entirely market-driven. Nanta Tech's management stated they have no control over, nor any knowledge of, the specific reasons behind the significant price movement. The company reiterated its commitment to comply with all relevant disclosure obligations under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and its agreements with stock exchanges.

  • Nanta Tech received a BSE query on stock price movement.
  • Company attributes price changes solely to market conditions.
  • Management denies knowledge or control over price fluctuations.
  • Nanta Tech assures compliance with SEBI disclosure norms.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nanta Tech Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [SHARP] Sharp India Promoter Sells 75% Stake for ₹19.46 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sharp Corporation, the promoter and holding company of Sharp India Limited, has executed a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) on April 14, 2026, to sell its entire 75.00% stake, comprising 1,94,58,000 equity shares, to Smart Services Private Limited. The transaction is valued at ₹19,45,80,000, with each share priced at ₹10.00. Upon completion, Sharp Corporation will cease to be in control of Sharp India and will no longer hold any shares. This acquisition by Smart Services Private Limited triggers a mandatory open offer for the public shareholders of Sharp India, in accordance with SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Sharp Corporation divests its entire 75% stake in Sharp India.
  • Smart Services Private Limited acquires 1,94,58,000 shares.
  • The deal is valued at ₹19.46 crore, at ₹10.00 per share.
  • Transaction triggers a mandatory open offer for public shareholders.
  • Sharp Corporation will lose control and cease to be a shareholder.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHARP INDIA LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [VERITAS] Veritas (India) Ltd Regularizes Jayaramakrishnan Kannan as Independent Director
item.description:
Veritas (India) Ltd announced the regularisation of Mr. Jayaramakrishnan Kannan's appointment as a Non-Executive Independent Director. This decision was approved by the company's members through a Postal Ballot Resolution dated April 13, 2026. Mr. Kannan was initially appointed as an Additional Director effective February 05, 2026. His regularised term is for five consecutive years, commencing from February 05, 2026, and concluding on February 04, 2031. Mr. Kannan, a former Vice President at TCS, brings approximately 40 years of experience in the IT industry. He has confirmed no relation to other directors and no debarment by SEBI.

  • Shareholders approved Mr. Jayaramakrishnan Kannan's appointment.
  • He is now a Non-Executive Independent Director for 5 years.
  • Term runs from February 5, 2026, to February 4, 2031.
  • Mr. Kannan brings 40 years of IT industry experience from TCS.
  • His appointment enhances corporate governance and board expertise.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VERITAS (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [CGPOWER] CG Power: Shirish Shah appointed VP Strategic Sourcing; Deven Jani re-designated
item.description:
CG Power and Industrial Solutions Ltd announced changes in its Senior Management Personnel. Mr. Deven Jani, previously Vice President - Strategic Sourcing, has been re-designated as Vice President - i2v & ESG Head. In this new focused role, he will cease to be part of the Senior Management Personnel (SMP) of the company, effective April 14, 2026. Concurrently, Mr. Shirish Shah has been appointed as Vice President - Strategic Sourcing and will join the Senior Management Personnel, also effective April 14, 2026. Mr. Shah brings over three decades of experience in procurement, sourcing, and supply chain management across leading industrial organizations, with a strong track record in cost optimization and efficiency.

  • Deven Jani re-designated as VP - i2v & ESG Head.
  • Deven Jani will cease to be part of Senior Management Personnel.
  • Shirish Shah appointed VP - Strategic Sourcing, joining Senior Management.
  • Both management changes are effective from April 14, 2026.
  • Shirish Shah brings 30+ years experience in procurement and supply chain.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CG Power and Industrial Solutions Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [VIVANTA] Vivanta Promoters Declare No Share Encumbrance for FY26
item.description:
Promoters of Vivanta Industries Ltd. have submitted disclosures under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The disclosures confirm that various promoters held a total of 1,13,50,000 shares as of March 31, 2026. Crucially, they declared that no shares were encumbered (pledged), directly or indirectly, during the entire financial year. This compliance filing provides transparency regarding promoter shareholding and their commitment to not pledge their holdings, which is often seen as a positive indicator of management confidence and financial stability.

  • Promoters declared shareholdings as of March 31, 2026.
  • No shares were encumbered by promoters during FY26.
  • Total 1,13,50,000 shares held by declared promoters.
  • Filing complies with SEBI SAST Regulation 31(4).
  • Indicates stable promoter holding and no pledging.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vivanta Industries Ltd | Category: Shareholding
